skills.name: Vals de Lepine
skills.description: Fires Lepin Noir, dealing damage to enemies hit and pulling targets that can be knocked back towards Braise.

effects: Not treated as an attack skill in the [Reshofman] buff.
When hitting a monster, [Cicatrice] hits the enemy.
When hitting an enemy PC, [not twice] hits the enemy.
When hitting an enemy that can be knocked back, pulls the enemy toward Braise.
[Cicatrice] Duration: 60 seconds.
Attack speed -10%, movement speed -10%, DEF Rating -1.
[not twice] Duration: 60 seconds.
Will not be pulled toward Braise during the duration.

skills.name: Yurman
skills.description: Deals damage by exploding a special bullet in front.
skills.target: Up to 8 enemies within a 10m x 80 degree range in front.

effects: Double skill damage to monsters when in [Cicatrice] state.
The closer the distance to the enemy, the higher the skill damage. (Up to 1.5x for PC.)
Ignores up to 50 additional defenses equal to the sum of [DEX] and [Agility] * 0.167.
When in [Reshofman Stage 1] state.
Increases the number of hits to 15.
When in [Reshofman Stage 2] state.
Applies the same damage at all distances.
Double skill damage to monsters when in [Cicatrice] state.
The closer the distance to the enemy, the higher the skill damage. (Up to 1.5x for PC.)
Ignores up to 50 additional defenses equal to the sum of [DEX] and [Agility] * 0.167.
When in [Reshofman Stage 1] state.
Increases the number of hits to 15.
When in [Reshofman Stage 2] state.
Applies the same damage at all distances.
